description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a combination of white and gray exterior walls. The front area is dominated by a gated driveway and a small parking lot with marked spaces, enclosed by a wooden fence. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the upper floor, while the ground floor includes a main entry door and additional glass doors. The rear and side views reveal utility areas and a mix of window sizes, with some sections lacking windows for privacy. The roof is flat and partially accessible, with visible HVAC units and skylights. The overall structure is compact, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and urban integration.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a gated driveway, parking spaces, and large windows, enclosed by a wooden fence. The design is boxy and functional, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated driveway, parking spaces, main entry door, and large windows on the upper floor.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden fence, parking area, and the side wall with minimal windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house with several windows and visible rooftop utilities.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the numbered parking spaces, side entry, and the continuation of the wooden fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a glass door, no porch, and a gated driveway integrated into the front fence.
